description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI to monitor Mu rhythm (motor cortex alpha activity) using the Motor Imagery dataset from '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt'. The Band Power widget must be configured to show data for Channel 3 and Channel 4 only. Save a screenshot of the active stream after at least 5 seconds to '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/mu_rhythm_config.png'.
